properties.displayName: Enforce PostgreSQL Single Server 'Allow access to Azure services' is disabled
properties.description: If access from Azure services is enabled, the server's firewall will accept connections from all Azure resources, including resources not in your subscription. This is usually not a desired configuration. Instead, set up firewall rules to allow access from specific network ranges or VNET rules to allow access from specific virtual networks.

metadata.description: Enable or disable the execution of the policy
